items.name: Mostly Ghostly Potion
items.description: How can you be mostly ghostly? Click to fly around as a ghost; your character appears transparent and can fly!

items.name: Magic Dragon
items.description: Little Jackie Paper grew up to be an arsonist. Sad but true.

items.name: Captain's Flintlock
items.description: This flintlock is slightly more accurate than the average pirate's flintlock.  It's gold plated so the captain knows if any of the other pirates try to switch flintlocks with him while he's sleeping.

items.name: Gravity Disruptor
items.description: Disrupt the battlefield!

items.name: Confusion's Cauldron
items.description: Confuse your enemies motion with this cauldron's powerful potion!

items.name: Spring Sword of Growth
items.description: As spring plants grow, so does this sword.  One might wield it easily at first, but with each blox, it becomes larger and larger.

items.name: Wizards of the Astral Isles: Pegasus
items.description: Soar above ROBLOXIA on your very own Pegasus.

items.name: Make It Rain
items.description: Making it rain has never been so easy!  Throw money around like it ain't no thang.  People near you when you make it rain will follow you around to pick money up.

items.name: Telamon's Foe Hammer
items.description: For when a ban hammer just doesn't hit hard enough.

items.name: Great White Mount
items.description: Take a bite out of the sky with this hovering friendly shark.

items.name: Maraca
items.description: So annoying it might just make everyone ban musical instruments from their places.

items.name: Chameleon Potion
items.description: No it's not a karma chameleon - and thank goodness for that!  This will transform your appearance to be like whatever you click.  Now you see me... now you think I'm a grey baseboard.

items.name: Earth Summoning Horn
items.description: Blow upon this mighty relic to summon a massive earthquake within a 30 stud radius of where you're standing. Unanchored bricks begin to shake and break apart, and players trip and fall to the ground, slowly losing health. Three shockwaves are sent out, dealing around 20 damage per hit.

items.name: Amazing Shrinking Elixir
items.description: Tiny is the new giant.

items.name: Ocherous Katana of the Setting Sun
items.description: I am anti-life, the beast of judgement. I am the dark at the end of everything. The end of universes, gods, worlds... of everything. And what will you be then, Dreamlord?

items.name: Protest Sign: We'd Rather Have User GUIs Later...
items.description: We don't know what GUIs are, and we don't want to know. If you ask us, there's enough goo in ROBLOX without making things any more gooey. We will fight to the death anyone who disagrees.

items.name: Stun Grenade
items.description: The stun grenade causes temporary paralysis to all those in the blast radius, and does 20 damage points to surrounding enemies.

items.name: Kami Potion
items.description: Fly around the world shooting laser beams out of your eyes.  Can you think of a better way to spend an afternoon?  Because I can't.  And I really tried.

items.name: Trollin' Pumpkin
items.description: "Everyday I'm trollin' / Trollin' Trollin" Trololololo

items.name: Fallen Artemis Sword & Shield
items.description: When equipped this shield doubles your current and max health. Click to slash for 15 damage per hit.  The special attack repeatedly strikes enemies for 30 damage per hit, one hit per second. Release the left mouse button while charging the do a double slash for 15 damage per hit.

items.name: The Axe of Undoing: A Walmart Exclusive
items.description: This axe will be the undoing of everything!  Awarded when you redeemed a card from Walmart in March, 2012.

items.name: Gear suppressor 777
items.description: This will make your enemies speechless. 10 seconds of no tool usage should be plenty of time for you to finish them off.

items.name: Korblox Sword and Shield
items.description: The Korblox both fight and defend with stony spikes.

items.name: Bear Mine Gun
items.description: With the Bear Mine Gun, you strategically place two “bear mines” and remotely trigger them to come together at a high velocity for an explosive bear hug, instantly killing anyone caught in the middle.

items.name: Trident
items.description: Short range weapon that can also be thrown (double click to throw).

items.name: Black and White Sword
items.description: Click to double slash your opponents. A successful hit deals 25 damage. Beware a wielder of this sword's jump.  After jumping they will spin around leaving phantom blades that will do 10 damage per hit.

items.name: Gravitron 3000
items.description: Toss this to negate gravity for everyone but yourself.

items.name: Remote Explosive Detonator
items.description: Push the button!  Now!

items.name: Explosive Super Glider
items.description: With the click of a mouse you are airborne. While in the air, you can drop deadly bombs on your enemies. The bombs do 100 damage per hit, but they have a small radius.  Aim carefully.

items.name: Knights of Redcliff: Sword and Shield
items.description: Second only to the infamous Redcliff Archers, the Redcliff Knights who wield the sword and shield, are fast and efficient.  They see their target, and they take him out in 5 swipes or less.
